EditorProperties.Property: IF (NotIn(ActualRaw ,.,0)) AND (NotIn(PredictSO99 ,.,0)) AND (In(PREDICT ,.,0)) AND (In(ActualClean ,.,0)) RETURN (1) ELSE (0)
IF FlagTrain1 = 0 AND FlagTrain2 = 0 AND ACTUALCLEAN / ActualRaw > 2 AND PREDICT / PredictSO99 > 2 RETURN 1 ELSE 0
IF (ActualRaw=.) AND (PredictSO99=.) AND (PREDICT <> .) AND (ACTUALCLEAN <> .) RETURN (1) ELSE (0)

(Sum(ForAll, Abs(PredictSO99 - ActualRaw)) / Sum(ForAll, ActualRaw) - (Sum(ForAll, Abs(PredictSO99 - ActualRaw)) - Sum(ByGroup, Abs(PredictSO99 - ActualRaw)) + Sum(ByGroup, Abs(PREDICT - ActualRaw))) / Sum(ForAll, ActualRaw)) * 100
IF (In(ActualRaw ,.,0)) AND (NotIn(ACTUALCLEAN,.,0)) AND (In(PredictSO99,.,0)) AND (NotIn(PREDICT,.,0)) RETURN (1) ELSE (0)
IF (In(ActualRaw,.,0)) AND (In(ACTUALCLEAN,.,0)) AND (In(PredictSO99,.,0)) AND (NotIn(PREDICT,.,0)) RETURN (1) ELSE (0)
IF FlagTrain1 = 0 AND FlagTrain2 = 0 AND ActualRaw / ACTUALCLEAN > 2 AND PredictSO99 / PREDICT > 2 RETURN 1 ELSE 0

IF Missing(Sum(ByGroup, ACTUALCLEAN)) AND Missing(Sum(ByGroup, ActualRaw)) AND Missing(Sum(ByGroup, PredictSO99)) AND Missing(Sum(ByGroup, Predict)) RETURN (1) ELSE (0)

P.Span: Liste des pages avec un explication du propos et liens
: level 4 at Ecolab (but can be tested at any level)
